name: Applesauce-Raisin Cookies/Diabetic
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the oil and sugar together until light and fluffy.
2. Add the egg and beat until well combined.
3. Blend in the vanilla and applesauce.
4. Stir in the flours, baking powder, baking soda, cinnamon, cloves, oats, and raisins until just mixed.
5. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto a lightly oiled baking sheet.
6. Bake at 375°F for 10 minutes or until golden brown.
7. Cool on a wire rack before serving.
